# Hazam al-Jalamid Phosphorite

**Summary**: A phosphorite formation in the Hazm al-Jalamid area.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1996-jarad|Jarad, 1996]] evaluated the hazam-al-jalamid-phosphorite for its geostatistical properties.

## Depositional Environment

- [[1996-jarad|Jarad, 1996]] Restricted to semi-restricted shallow marine.

## Reservoir Properties

- [[1996-jarad|Jarad, 1996]] P2O5 content varies across three horizons.

## Diagenetic History



## Key Findings Across Sources

- Horizon 1 and Horizon 3 contain high-quality phosphorite, while Horizon 2 is an intermediate zone. ([[1996-jarad|Jarad, 1996, p. 49]])
